title: Office of Communications section 400 licence fees and penalties account 2024 to 2025
text:
This document contains the following information: Office of Communications section 400 licence fees and penalties account 2024 to 2025.

This paper was laid before Parliament on 10 July 2025 in response to a legislative requirement or as a Return to an Address and was ordered to be printed by the House of Commons.
